title: pinalia jerdoniana
intro: Pinalia jerdoniana, also known as the Indian orchid, is a species of orchid native to the Western Ghats in India. It is a flowering plant that has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to reduce inflammation and improve digestion. The plant is rich in antioxidants and has been found to have antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help to prevent various health issues such as fever, cough, and skin diseases. In traditional medicine, Pinalia jerdoniana is often prepared as a decoction, powder, or oil, and has been used to treat various health conditions, including fever, cough, and skin diseases.
